channel.description: Recent content in Projects on David Geddes

item.title: Bible Reader
item.description: Multilingual Bible reader supporting multiple languages and translation versions

item.title: HushSMS
item.description: Secure, encrypted private messaging app for Android using native SMS facilities

item.title: Racquet Stringer
item.description: Professional job logging app for racquet stringers managing tennis, badminton, and squash racquets
